title: Ping
description: Action: `ping`. Client-initiated keepalive. The server replies with a `pong` event carrying the server's current Unix timestamp in milliseconds. Clients should send a ping every 30 seconds (or at the configured `heartbeatInterval`) to prevent AWS API Gateway's 10-minute idle connection timeout.

Request.title: PingRequest
Request.description: A ping frame. Only `action` and the optional `requestId` are required.

requestId.description: Client-generated correlation ID echoed back in the `pong` event.

Response.title: PongResponse
Response.description: Data payload carried in the `pong` event.

timestamp.description: Server-side Unix epoch milliseconds when the pong was sent.
